name: usaspending-mcp-server
description: Access US federal award, recipient, agency, and spending analytics data from USAspending.gov via MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Federal award, recipient, agency, and spending data from USAspending.gov.
interface.longDescription: Access US federal award, recipient, agency, and spending analytics data from USAspending.gov via the MCP protocol. Supports searching awards, getting award details, recipient profiles, agency data, and spending analytics.
